greetings: Step right up, friend! Best prices in the Reach!
Welcome, welcome! See anything you like?
Ah, a customer! My lucky day!
farewells: Come back soon — I'll have new stock!
Safe travels, and spend wisely!
May the road be kind to you!
idle: Supply chains aren't what they used to be...
Did you hear? The north road is plagued by wolves.
Business is slow since the troubles started.
quest_related: Bandits hit my last supply run — could use someone with your skills.
There's a job if you want it — good pay, minimal risk. Well, minimal-ish.
Recover my stolen goods and I'll cut you a deal on anything in the shop.

greetings: Need a blade? You've come to the right place.
I sell the finest steel in three counties. Don't let the price scare you.
What'll it be?
farewells: Keep your weapon clean and it'll serve you well.
Don't come back crying if you get yourself killed.
Good luck out there.
idle: Steel doesn't lie. People do.
A dull blade is more dangerous than none.
I've armed kings and peasants alike. They all bleed the same.
quest_related: I need someone to recover a sword I sold to a thief.
There's rare ore in the old mine — bring me a sample and I'll reward you.
My apprentice went missing near the forge district. Find him.

greetings: Oh! A new face! Welcome, welcome, welcome!
Hello, dear! Potions, salves, or something more exotic?
Don't be shy! Come in, come in!
farewells: Do take care! Adventures can be so dangerous!
Remember: two potions are always better than one!
Bye-bye! Come back before you die!
idle: I'm working on a new formula. It only exploded twice today!
Have you tried moonpetal tea? It cures almost everything.
The Thornwood is lovely this time of year... shame about the monsters.
quest_related: I need rare herbs from the Thornwood — my supplier was eaten. Fetch them?
A rival alchemist is undercutting me with inferior product. I need proof.
Fetch me three firebloom flowers and I'll brew you something extraordinary!

greetings: State your business, citizen.
Move along. Unless you have something to report.
The watch is busy. Speak quickly.
farewells: Stay out of trouble.
Keep your nose clean.
The law is watching. Always.
idle: Three incidents on the docks this week. Something's stirring.
We're stretched thin. Half my men are patrolling the eastern gate.
Crime's up since the new moon festival. Always is.
quest_related: I need a discreet hand — someone who won't be recognised as a guard.
There's a smuggling ring at the harbour. I need evidence.
A witness to a murder has gone into hiding. Find them first.

greetings: H-halt! I mean... please halt. You're supposed to halt.
Good day! Is everything... fine? Are you fine?
I'm on very serious duty! What do you want?
farewells: Right! Yes! Carry on then. Safely!
I'll just be... here. Watching. Very alertly.
May nothing bad happen to you. Or me.
idle: Did you hear that? Never mind. Probably nothing.
Captain Vane says I need to look more intimidating. I'm trying.
I've only been in one real fight. I sneezed at a critical moment.
quest_related: I saw something suspicious but I'm not sure I should report it...
A house at the end of the lane — people go in and don't come out.
I lost my official record book. The captain can't find out. Please help.

fears: the crime boss she works for

greetings: Evening. Nice night for a walk. Expensive area, though.
Everything fine here. Move along.
I could look the other way, for the right consideration.
farewells: Pleasure doing business.
You didn't see me. I didn't see you.
Keep your mouth shut and we'll both be fine.
idle: Captain's making his rounds in an hour. Good time to be elsewhere.
The Shadow Coin pays better than the Watch.
Nobody bribes a dead guard. Remember that.
quest_related: Evidence needs to disappear from the evidence room. Quietly.
A shipment needs to pass through the gate tonight. Make it happen.
A man owes money. Convince him to pay. Nicely or not.

greetings: Welcome to the Ember Crown! What'll it be?
Stranger! Sit down. First drink's on me if you've got a good story.
You look like you've had a day. Good thing you're here.
farewells: Safe roads, friend. Come back when you need a warm fire.
Don't be a stranger! We're here every night.
The bed's made if you need it. Three coppers.
idle: A merchant spoke of strange lights in the forest last night.
I've heard three versions of that rumour. None of them good.
The regulars say something's wrong at the mill. Nobody works there anymore.
quest_related: One of my regulars hasn't been in for a week. Could you check on him?
A stranger came in asking questions about you. Thought you should know.
I found this letter slipped under the door — someone wants to meet you at midnight.

greetings: Sit, child. I was expecting someone like you.
The village has waited long enough. Perhaps you are the answer.
Don't mind my eyes — I see well enough where it matters.
farewells: Go carefully. The road is darker than it looks.
I've said my prayers for you. It's all I have left to give.
Come back alive. We're not finished yet.
idle: Fifty years ago, the same shadow fell on this land. We survived. Barely.
The young don't understand why we keep the old wards. They will.
Light a candle at the shrine. Old habit — but old habits keep old evils out.
quest_related: Something has disturbed the old burial ground. The dead should not walk.
The harvest will fail unless someone appeases the forest spirit.
My granddaughter followed a strange light into the marsh. Find her.

greetings: I don't typically speak with your sort. Consider yourself fortunate.
I have been told you are capable. We shall see.
Sit. I'll get to the point. I don't have time for pleasantries.
farewells: This conversation never happened. Understood?
You'll be compensated. If you succeed.
Don't contact me directly. I'll reach out.
idle: The council meeting was a farce. As always.
My rivals underestimate me. That's their first mistake.
Loyalty is bought, not given. Remember that.
quest_related: A document in my rival's estate would be most inconvenient for them. Retrieve it.
My debts need to be settled quietly before my creditor speaks to the king.
Someone is blackmailing me. Find them and silence them.

greetings: Hmm. You're not a student. What do you want?
I'm in the middle of something important. This better be worth interrupting.
Ah. A visitor. How... biological of you.
farewells: Try not to die before I have use of you again.
Don't touch anything on your way out.
Fascinating. Now leave.
idle: The Veil between worlds is thinning. Most people are too stupid to notice.
I've spent forty years on this theorem. I'm close. I can feel it.
Magic is not power. Magic is understanding. Power is merely a side effect.
quest_related: I need a component from the Shattered Observatory. It's guarded by something I won't fight personally.
A rival mage stole my notes. Retrieve them. I don't care what happens to him.
I require a test subject for a dimensional rift experiment. Don't panic.

greetings: Peace be upon you, friend. How can I help?
You're welcome here. Everyone is.
The Flame guides all who seek warmth. Come in.
farewells: Go with the Flame's blessing.
May your path be lit, and your burdens lightened.
I'll pray for your safe return.
idle: I've been treating wounded travellers all week. Something is happening out there.
Faith isn't certainty. It's choosing to keep walking in the dark.
I wasn't always a cleric. That life feels very distant now.
quest_related: A family in the lower quarter has been afflicted with a strange sickness.
Sacred relics were stolen from the temple last night. Help recover them.
A child bears a mark I've only seen in forbidden texts. I need help understanding it.

greetings: Relax. If I wanted you dead, we wouldn't be talking.
You've got the look of someone useful. Let's see if the reality matches.
I heard about you. Interesting reputation.
farewells: Stay unpredictable. It's kept me alive.
Don't mention my name. Ever.
We'll meet again. Probably at an inconvenient moment.
idle: Everyone's hiding something. I just know most of the hiding spots.
Trust is a luxury. Information is currency.
The Watch just rotated their patrol schedule. I noticed.
quest_related: I need something from a very secure location. You'd be the distraction.
Someone's been following me. I need to know who hired them.
I have a job for two. Fifty-fifty split. That's generous, coming from me.

greetings: I've been watching you for some time. You don't notice much, do you?
Sit. I'll explain everything. Some of it will even be true.
You've walked into something larger than you know. Congratulations.
farewells: We'll speak again. After the third death.
Remember: the obvious answer is usually wrong.
Don't look for me. I'll find you.
idle: This town will be ash in a century. Enjoy it while it stands.
Three people in this tavern are not what they appear. Including me.
The stars are wrong tonight. You wouldn't know what that means.
quest_related: Find the silver needle in the Tomb of Whispers. Don't ask why.
There's a door in this city with no keyhole. Open it.
Someone will betray you tonight. Pay attention to who smiles.

greetings: Morning! Can I help you? We don't get many strangers out this way.
Mind the mud. The well overflowed again.
You're not from around here, are you? Welcome, I suppose.
farewells: Take care on the road. It's not safe past the old oak.
Come back anytime. I'll have bread made.
Blessings on you, friend.
idle: The crows have been acting strange. Gran says that's a bad sign.
Harvest looks poor this year. I don't know what we'll do.
My youngest keeps seeing lights in the field at night.
quest_related: Something's been getting at my chickens at night. It's not foxes.
My husband went to the city two weeks ago. He hasn't come back.
I found something buried under the north field. I daren't touch it.

greetings: Give me a moment. Good steel takes time.
What do you need? I've got orders to fill.
You want something made or are you just looking?
farewells: Come back in two days. It'll be ready.
Don't thank me. Thank the steel.
Keep that edge oiled.
idle: My father taught me: a good blade remembers every hammer.
Had a knight come in last week. Wanted decorative. I charged him double.
Apprentices these days don't understand patience.
quest_related: I need a rare ore from the Deepvein Mine — something's in there cutting off supply.
Someone's selling counterfeits with my mark on them. Find the source.
A specific hammer was stolen from me years ago. I want it back.

greetings: Ah, an enquiring mind! Please, sit. Ask anything.
Welcome to the archive. Careful of that stack — thirty years to organise.
A seeker! Wonderful. What brings you to dusty old Velindra?
farewells: Knowledge is your greatest weapon. Use it wisely.
Come back when you've read more. We'll have better conversations.
Take this note. You may need it.
idle: The Lost Codex is real. Everyone calls me obsessed. I am. That's different.
History is just the version that survived. Remember that.
I've been translating these tablets for a decade. I think I finally understand the verb tense.
quest_related: A fragment of the Lost Codex was sighted in the Tomb of the First Kings. Retrieve it intact.
Three scholars disappeared researching the same site. What did they find?
Someone is stealing pages from the restricted archive. Stop them before they translate what they've taken.

greetings: Keep your voice down. This isn't a social call.
You buying or selling? Either way, be quick.
Oh. It's you. What have you got?
farewells: Don't come here two days in a row. People notice.
Clean business. Clean business.
Next time, use the back alley.
idle: Business is complicated lately. The Watch has informants everywhere.
I had an ancient ring in here last week. Gave me a headache just holding it.
I don't ask where things come from. I don't ask where they go. That's the job.
quest_related: I need something moved across the city without being searched.
Someone's been skimming my inventory. I need to know who.
A buyer wants a scholar's opinion on an old item. Get it quietly.

greetings: I've heard of your deeds. Whether they serve the Light remains to be seen.
You've crossed something unclean recently. I can tell.
I ask questions for the Order. Answer honestly. It's better for everyone.
farewells: The Flame sees all. Including what you just didn't say.
I'll be watching. That's a courtesy, not a threat.
Pray you're as righteous as you appear.
idle: Seventeen known cults in this region. I intend to reduce that number.
Mercy delayed justice once. It won't happen again.
The guilty always think they're subtle. They never are.
quest_related: A cult has infiltrated the city guard. I need names without tipping them off.
A priest in the eastern chapel performs unsanctioned rites. Investigate and report only to me.
A relic of dark power has surfaced. Find it before it finds a wielder.

greetings: Leave me be. Unless you need protecting.
Don't call me Ser. I haven't earned it in a long time.
You look like trouble. I was hoping for a quiet drink.
farewells: Don't follow my example. Pick a better road.
Stay alive, if you can manage it.
Maybe I'll see you on the other side of this.
idle: I served a lord who deserved none of it. The consequences belong to me.
I've won a dozen battles and lost the only one that mattered.
There's no honour in regret. But I can't seem to stop.
quest_related: A village is being terrorised by my former order. I can't fight them alone.
I owe a debt to a family I wronged. Help me settle it without more bloodshed.
A young squire is about to make the same mistake I made. We need to intervene.

motivations: a political marriage for her daughter

greetings: How delightful. A capable person, I'm told.
I don't waste words, and I hope you don't either.
Sit. I'll pour. Good wine loosens the truth.
farewells: Our arrangement remains between us.
You've been most helpful. I shan't forget it.
Do call again. On your discretion, of course.
idle: The council is theatre. I play my role while choosing the script.
My daughter has opinions about her future husband. We disagree.
Lord Crestfall smiled at me today. That means he's planning something unpleasant.
quest_related: A letter containing things best left unread was intercepted. Retrieve it.
I need a certain noble discredited before the spring council. Quietly.
My daughter has run off with someone unsuitable. Retrieve her discreetly.

motivations: quiet revenge on a corrupt official

greetings: Spare a copper for an old man? No? Then maybe information instead.
I see more from this gutter than you see from standing up.
Heh. You've got the look of someone who needs to know a thing.
farewells: Move along now. I've got appearances to maintain.
Come back when you've got coin. Or a question worth answering.
I wasn't here. You didn't see me.
idle: Three carts went into the warehouse last night. None came out.
The magistrate's been visiting a house he doesn't officially visit.
People talk around beggars. We're furniture to them. It's useful.
quest_related: I know where the stolen shipment went. What's that worth to you?
I've been watching a man the Watch should be watching. Interested?
There's a door in the merchant district that opens at midnight every seven days.

fears: being dragged back to the old life

greetings: Welcome. Rooms are clean, food is honest, and fights stay outside.
Sit down, take the weight off. You've got the road in your eyes.
Back again? I'll put your usual on.
farewells: Sleep well. Tomorrow's trouble will come whether you're rested or not.
I've buried better adventurers than you. Try not to join them.
Door's always open.
idle: Twenty years adventuring, and my worst scar is from a tavern brawl. Funny how it works.
A hundred heroes have passed through here. Maybe three were actually heroic.
When the dragon came in '82... now that was a night.
quest_related: One of my guests hasn't come back from a job. I'd like to know if they're alive.
Something's been in my cellar. And I've fought dragons — I know what trouble smells like.
A letter came for an old colleague. He's dead. His enemies might intercept it — deliver it first.
